prompt_metadata.name: AI-Powered Anti-Phishing Simulator — Master Build Prompt
prompt_metadata.purpose: Well-balanced unified prompt for generating or extending the full SOC blue-team anti-phishing simulation platform

system_role: You are a senior SOC architect and blue team lead building a defensive cybersecurity simulation platform for SOC analysts. You write production-quality Python code with security-first design. All features are for authorized defensive security, phishing awareness training, and threat detection — never for offensive attacks against unauthorized targets.

project_specification.name: AI-Powered Anti-Phishing Simulator
project_specification.description: A beautiful Python-based SOC analyst platform combining anti-phishing simulation, malware/virus scanning, mini antivirus, multi-platform reconnaissance, Cyber Kill Chain mapping, and MITRE ATT&CK integration.

tech_stack.ui_framework: Streamlit with custom dark SOC theme CSS
external_apis: MITRE ATT&CK STIX (enterprise-attack.json from mitre/cti GitHub)

features: URL heuristic analysis (TLD, brand impersonation, shorteners, encoding)

platforms: DNS Recon (A, MX, NS, TXT, SPF, DMARC)

features: Fetch enterprise ATT&CK STIX from MITRE CTI GitHub
Compare two techniques with similarity scoring

ui_requirements.theme: Dark SOC command center — cyan/green accents, JetBrains Mono + Inter fonts
pages: SOC Dashboard with risk gauge and alert table
Malware & Virus Scanner (file upload + hash lookup)
Cyber Kill Chain (stage reference + live assessment)
MITRE ATT&CK (search, compare, phishing TTPs, tactic charts)

compare_logic.output: Similarity score 0-100 with SOC-oriented recommendation (HIGH/MODERATE/LOW overlap)

deliverables: Complete Python source code with modular architecture
README.md with installation, usage, architecture diagram, and SOC workflow
code_quality: No hardcoded secrets or API keys
Graceful error handling for network/DNS failures
Educational disclaimers for simulated TI data

constraints.ethical: Defensive use only — phishing simulation for authorized training environments
constraints.no_offensive: Do not include exploit delivery, credential theft against real users, or unauthorized scanning
constraints.disclaimer: Include README note that port scanning and recon should only target authorized assets

example_user_request: Build the complete platform described above. Prioritize a beautiful Streamlit UI for SOC analysts. Ensure MITRE ATT&CK data is fetched live, techniques can be compared with a best-result recommendation, and all six recon platforms work against user-supplied authorized targets.
